class.name: StartStopPanel
class.description: A panel that displays a start/stop button.

class.name: TextSubPanel
class.description: A panel that displays text from a ROS 2 topic.

class.name: TextPubPanel
class.description: A panel that sends text to a ROS 2 topic.

class.name: AttitudeIndicatorDisplay
class.description: An artificial horizon / attitude indicator display.

class.name: GeoViewDisplay
class.description: Satellite/base-map imagery (XYZ / MBTiles) with async cache.

class.name: VisualTargetsDisplay
class.description: A display that shows an interactive marker.
